# terrible_community_general_gitlab_deploy_key (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `key` (String) Deploy key.
- `project` (String) ID or Full path of project in the form of group/name.
- `title` (String) Deploy key's title.

### Optional

- `can_push` (Boolean) Whether this key can push to the project.
- `state` (String) When `present` the deploy key is added to the project if it does not exist. When `absent` it is removed from the project if it exists.

### Read-Only

- `deploy_key` (String) API object.
- `error` (String) The error message returned by the GitLab API.
- `msg` (String) Success or failure message.
- `result` (String) JSON-parsed response from the server.
